name: obsidian-better-vim
description: Fixes some annoyances with obsidians vim mode.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist/ && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && mkdir -p dist && cp main.js dist/ && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp styles.css dist/
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Nils Goeke
